name: Apricot-Orange Truffles
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Dried apricots (about 4-1/2 Oz); finely chopped; packed
1/4 cup Unsalted butter; cut into pieces
10 oz Bittersweet chocolate or semisweet chocolate; chopped
3 tbsp Cointreau or other orange liqueur
8 Dried apricot halves; cut into decorative shapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3/4 cup chopped apricots, orange juice, and sugar in a heavy small saucepan. Bring to boil over medium heat. Cook until apricots soften and almost all liquid is absorbed, stirring frequently, about 5 minutes. Cool.
2. Stir cream, butter, and corn syrup in the heavy medium saucepan over medium heat until butter melts and mixture just boils. Remove from heat. Add 10 ounces chopped chocolate and stir until melted and smooth. Stir in apricot mixture and Cointreau. Spread mixture evenly in an 8-inch square pan.
3. Freeze until firm.
4. Line a large baking sheet with waxed paper. Cut the chocolate mixture into 25 squares. Using a spoon, scoop out one square. Roll it between palms of hands into irregular rounds, then roll in cocoa powder to form smooth rounds. Place on prepared squares and foil.
5. Freeze until very firm, about 2 hours.
6. Line another baking sheet with foil. Melt remaining chocolate in the top of a double boiler set over simmering water, stirring until a candy thermometer registers 115°F. Remove chocolate from heat. Working quickly, submerge one truffle in melted chocolate, tilting pan and turning truffle to coat completely if necessary. Using a fork, lift truffle from chocolate.
7. Tap fork gently against side of pan to remove excess chocolate from truffle. Using a knife as an aid, slide truffle off the fork onto foil-lined baking sheet. Top truffle decoratively with apricot shapes.
8. Repeat with remaining truffles; if melted chocolate becomes too cool, set pan over simmering water and stir until candy thermometer registers 115°F. Chill truffles for 1 hour.
9. Place truffles in candy cups. Arrange in airtight containers lined with foil; chill.
10. For an elegant gift, place the truffles in gold- or silver-colored foil candy cups and arrange in a decorative box or tin.
